description:
ICICI Lombard Health Claims 2025 🔴 Will Your Claim Get Paid?

If you are searching for the best health insurance in India or trying to understand whether ICICI Lombard health insurance is really worth it, this video will give you the latest Q1 2025 data on claims settled, claim settlement ratio (CSR), incurred claim ratio (ICR), complaints, and outstanding claims.

📑25 Lessons I wish I Knew (e-book) - https://bit.ly/41MEODP
     Read On KIndle- https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0F295T5VG
📲 Ask your query - https://bit.ly/3FJium2
🔔 Join the Impact Buddy family - https://bit.ly/4l7cvra      
Join 🟢💬 WhatsApp & Stay ahead ! 📢✨ https://bit.ly/4hrGGGL

Choosing the right health insurance policy is never easy. We all hear about features, cashless hospitals, and low premiums, but the most important question is: Will your health claim actually get paid? That’s why I analyzed the public disclosure data of ICICI Lombard for Q1 2025, focusing only on health claims. Don’t worry about combined data of all insurance segments – here, we only review health insurance data that matters to you.

In this detailed breakdown, you’ll see:

Claim Settlement Ratio of ICICI Lombard health insurance in 2025

ICR (Incurred Claim Ratio) explained in simple terms

Number of outstanding claims and what they mean for policyholders

Complaints per 10,000 claims – how ICICI Lombard performs vs competitors

Whether ICICI Lombard can be considered among the best health insurance companies in India

CHAPTERS
00:00 Why Today's Video matters ?
02:00 Claims Paid Ratio
05:08 Claims Repudiation Ratio
08:33 Incurred Claim Ratio & Top Selling States
11:01 Complaints Data
14:24 Claim Settlement Ratio
15:41 Recap & Review
20:57 Conclusion- My Opinion
22:07 My Message to You 


When buying a health plan, most people just look at premiums or compare “which is the best health insurance policy in India.” But the truth is hidden in claims data. Because at the end of the day, if your insurer doesn’t pay when you need it, the policy has no meaning.

That’s why I created this video – to show you the reality of ICICI Lombard health insurance claims in 2025. You’ll get clarity on whether your claim will get approved, delayed, or rejected, and you’ll also understand how to read insurance data in a simple, layman-friendly way.

👉 Watch till the end if you want to make a smart choice while buying health insurance in India.

This video is part of my Insurance Impact series, where I simplify health insurance, review plans, and analyze claim settlement data of companies like ICICI Lombard, HDFC Ergo, Star Health, Care Health, Niva Bupa, Tata AIG, and more.

So, if you want to avoid future shocks during hospitalization, and learn how to pick the right health insurance company in India, this video is for you.

💡 Don’t forget to subscribe for more insurance insights, claim analysis, and real policyholder guidance. Together, let’s make insurance simple!

Ya, it's true. Data shows complaints volume is low as compared to claims rejected.
Reasons are not specified but my guess is- we do not complain in 2 situations.
1. Either we accept that the reason of claim rejection is fair, or
2. Policyholder is not aware of the complaint process

there might be other reasons too
